description: The MultiTextureFader component can be used with the PBSLerpMetallic or PBSLerpSpecular to lerp multiple textures rather than just one.

fields.FirstTexture: Usually set to the Texture set 0 of a lerping material.
fields.SecondTexture: Usually set to the Texture set 1 of a lerping material. The type of texture set like albedo or emission this one is driving should be the same as ``FirstTexture``.
fields.Lerp: The lerp field of the material. Can be left blank if using multiple of this component on the same material.
fields.Position: The position in the list of ``Textures`` to fade between. If this is a decimal, the ``FirstTexture`` and ``SecondTexture`` will be set to textures in ``Textures`` that are at the positon of floor and ceiling of this value.
fields.Textures: A list of textures to lerp between and set ``FirstTexture`` and ``SecondTexture`` to using ``Position`` to determine the texture from this list.

usage: Can be attached to a slot and given a list of materials. Using a PBSLerpMetallic or PBSLerpSpecular with this component can lerp the list of ``Textures`` using ``Position``. The lerp of the material can be driven via the ``Lerp`` on this component.
